message:
test(property): add Outcome lattice + timer wheel property tests (bd-m46d)

Add 28 property tests in property_outcome_time.rs:
- Severity u8 round-trip and total order
- Outcome severity matches variant, exactly one predicate true
- Join lattice laws: commutative severity, takes worse, idempotent,
  Ok is identity, Panicked dominates
- Functor laws: map/map_err preserve severity, map(id) = id
- Monad laws: and_then short-circuits, left/right identity
- Result conversion round-trip
- Timer wheel: registration counting, cancel decrements, fires on
  advance, no premature fire, cancelled timers don't fire, duration
  validation (rejects/accepts), overflow handling, clear

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
